description: Fix chat scroll jumping every 5s by replacing polling with Supabase Realtime in client chat, and implement photo upload with attachment display in messages
steps: 1. In src/app/espace-client/messages/[id]/page.tsx: Remove the polling useEffect (the setInterval 5000 block). Replace it with a Realtime subscription using subscribeToMessages and unsubscribeChannel from @/lib/supabase/realtime (same pattern as admin chat at src/app/admin/conversations/[id]/page.tsx lines 98-120). The callback should add new messages using setMessages with duplicate check (prev.some(m => m.id === newMsg.id)).

2. In src/app/espace-client/messages/[id]/page.tsx: Fix the scrollToBottom useEffect. Instead of triggering on [messages, scrollToBottom], use a useRef to track previous message count. Only scroll to bottom on initial load (when messages first arrive) and when a new message is appended (messages.length > prevCount). Do NOT scroll when messages are unchanged or re-fetched identically.
3. In src/app/espace-client/messages/[id]/page.tsx: Update the MessageItem interface to include 'attachments?: string[]'. Pass msg.attachments to ChatBubble.

4. In src/components/messages/ChatInput.tsx: Add photo upload functionality to the Paperclip button. Add a hidden <input type='file' accept='image/*' /> triggered by the Paperclip button click. When a file is selected, show a preview (thumbnail) above the input area. Add state for the selected file and its preview URL. Modify the onSend prop to accept an optional second parameter: onSend(message: string, attachments?: string[]). On send, if a file is selected, upload it to /api/upload-chat-image first to get the URL, then call onSend with the attachment URL array. Clear the preview after send.

5. Create a new API route src/app/api/upload-chat-image/route.ts: Accept a multipart/form-data POST with an image file. Use createServiceClient() to upload to Supabase Storage bucket 'chat-attachments'. Create the bucket if it doesn't exist (public bucket). Return the public URL of the uploaded file. Validate file type (image/*) and size (max 5MB).

6. In src/components/messages/ChatBubble.tsx: Add an optional 'attachments' prop (string[]). If attachments has URLs, render them as clickable images below the message content. Images should be displayed with max-width, rounded corners, and open in a new tab or a lightbox on click.
7. In src/app/api/messages/[id]/route.ts POST handler: Accept 'attachments' from the request body (default to []). Pass body.attachments || [] to the insert instead of hardcoded [].
8. In src/app/api/admin/conversations/[id]/route.ts POST handler: Accept 'attachments' from the request body (default to []). Pass body.attachments || [] to the insert instead of hardcoded [].

9. In src/app/espace-client/messages/[id]/page.tsx: Update the handleSend function to accept a second parameter (attachments?: string[]). Pass attachments to the POST body. Also update the ChatInput usage to pass the new onSend signature.

10. In src/app/admin/reparations/page.tsx: Modify handleStatusChange to use fetch('/api/admin/repairs/${repairId}', { method: 'PATCH', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ status: newStatus, status_history: newHistory }) }) instead of direct Supabase client call.

11. In src/app/api/admin/repairs/[id]/route.ts PATCH handler: Update to also accept and store 'status_history' from the body. Change the update call from .update({ status: body.status }) to .update({ status: body.status, ...(body.status_history ? { status_history: body.status_history } : {}) }).
12. Verify build passes with: PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.3/bin:$PATH" pnpm build
acceptance_criteria: Client chat page no longer uses setInterval polling - uses Supabase Realtime instead
scrollToBottom only fires on initial load and when new messages are added, not on every re-render
Paperclip button in ChatInput triggers file selection and shows preview
Images can be uploaded via /api/upload-chat-image and stored in Supabase Storage
ChatBubble displays image attachments when present
Message APIs accept and store attachments array
Admin repairs handleStatusChange uses fetch to PATCH API instead of direct Supabase call
verification: Run PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.3/bin:$PATH" pnpm build and confirm exit code 0
findings: RealtimeMessage type from realtime.ts lacks is_admin field - needed to cast via `as unknown as MessageItem` since the actual Postgres INSERT payload includes all columns. Build passes cleanly with only pre-existing img element warnings.
